Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at the event log there are three cases Case IDs 1 2 3 Lets break down each case Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the main sequence seems to be Receive Application RA Validate Form VF Assess Eligibility AE

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: After AE there are two possibilities 1 Directly go to Approval Decision AD as in Case 2 2 Request Missing Info RMI one or more times then go back to Validate Form VF and then to AD as in Cases 1 and 3

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the structure after AE is Either AD OR RMI followed by VF followed by AD

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The LOOP operator in process trees is defined as A then either exit or execute B and then A again So for RMI one or more times perhaps RMI plus can be modeled as loop RMI tau

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The possible traces for loop RMI tau are RMI RMI RMI and so on Yes that works Because the tau is silent So using loop RMI tau would generate one or more RMI activities

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then after the loop of RMIs we need to do VF then AD So the second branch after AE is sequence loop RMI tau then sequence VF AD

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the structure after AE is XOR AD and sequence loop RMI tau then sequence VF AD

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait I forgot about the SC and AC activities Looking back at the event logs All cases end with SC and AC after AD

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the full sequence is RA VF AE XOR part SC AC Where the XOR part is either AD or loop and VF then AD

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The entire process tree would be sequence RA then sequence VF then sequence AE then sequence XOR AD or sequence loop RMI tau then sequence VF AD then sequence SC AC

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Another approach after AE we have a loop that can be exited by going to AD perhaps loop XOR AD and sequence RMI VF with tau

Name: Validation - NE
Text: For Case 3 this alternative would generate RMI VF RMI VF AD but the log shows RMI RMI VF AD

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Therefore the initial model is correct and the alternative loop model is not appropriate

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 matches RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 1 matches RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 3 matches RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC
